Rule.Name: WindowsAppSDK
Rule.Description: Choose the Windows App SDK version this project builds against.

StringProperty.Name: WindowsAppSDKVersion
StringProperty.Description: An arbitrary WASDK version string, e.g. 3.0.0-dev0627-0742 or 2.2.0. The leading major version (3+) enables the newer XAML Window.Width / Height APIs; lower majors compile them out.
